case_title: CLARE, CHAPMAN, STOREY, MCLOUGHLIN & BOWEN, LLP VS WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY CLARE, CHAPMAN, STOREY, MCLOUGHLIN & BOWEN, LLP AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK AGENT FOR SERVICE: SHERRILL JOHNSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-29-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-28-2002 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLARE, CHAPMAN, STOREY, MCLOUGHLIN & BOWEN, LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $69.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,469.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
